body:
## Rationale

Top-10 list pages target "best [sub-genre] drummers" queries. 19 entries live. **All 3 sub-genres confirmed absent from top10Lists.js live entries AND all prior batch proposals (batches 6/14/16/17/18/19/20).**

**progressive-death-metal-drummers:**
- Targets: "best progressive death metal drummers" / "top prog death drummers"
- Cluster includes: Gene Hoglan (Death/Symbolic), Sean Reinert (Death/Human), Mike Portnoy (DT adjacent), Martin Lopez (Opeth/Morbid Angel), Gavin Harrison (PT)
- TAM: Huge — prog-death is a highly LLM-queried sub-genre ("what bands mix jazz and metal?")
- All anchor drummers are active on MetalForge with profiles + articles

**symphonic-metal-drummers:**
- Targets: "best symphonic metal drummers" / "symphonic black metal drummers ranked"
- Cluster includes: Hellhammer (Mayhem/Dimmu Borgir), Daray (Dimmu Borgir), Frost (Satyricon/various)
- All three have active MetalForge profiles and articles
- High LLM citation: "What makes symphonic metal different?" answer always includes drumming references

**blackened-death-metal-drummers:**
- Targets: "blackened death metal drummers" / "best war metal drummers"
- Cluster includes: Inferno (Behemoth), Pete Sandoval (Morbid Angel/Terrorizer), Paul Mazurkiewicz (Cannibal Corpse)
- Inferno = GA4 top page (7 views this week); Pete Sandoval = 50% GSC CTR
- High-intent query: fans of Behemoth/Morbid Angel specifically search for drummer recommendations

**Dedup confirmed:** All 3 slugs not in top10Lists.js (19 live entries) or any batch 1-20 proposal. Batch 14 (doom/groove/folk) and batch 20 (grindcore/viking/gothic) are different sub-genres.

## Implementation

**File to modify:** `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js`

**New list slugs:**
- `progressive-death-metal-drummers`
- `symphonic-metal-drummers`
- `blackened-death-metal-drummers`

**LLM files to create:**
- `public/llms/lists/progressive-death-metal-drummers.md`
- `public/llms/lists/symphonic-metal-drummers.md`
- `public/llms/lists/blackened-death-metal-drummers.md`

**Schema per page:** ItemList (10 entries), BreadcrumbList, FAQPage (≥3 Q&A)

**Content structure:** Intro paragraph → ranked list (10 drummers) with 50-word blurb per entry → FAQ section → internal links to drummer profiles + album articles

**Internal links (≥3 per page):**
- prog-death: /drummer/gene-hoglan, /drummer/sean-reinert, /drummer/martin-lopez, /articles/symbolic-drum-setup
- symphonic: /drummer/hellhammer, /drummer/daray, /articles/de-mysteriis-dom-sathanas-drum-setup
- blackened-death: /drummer/inferno, /drummer/pete-sandoval, /articles/the-satanist-drum-setup

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per list page (intro + 10 entries + FAQ)
- 10 ranked entries per list
- ≥3 internal links per page
- FAQPage schema ≥3 Q&A
- 3 LLM files

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves 3 new sub-genre "best drummers" query clusters. Progressive-death-metal has highest TAM. All 3 sub-genres are active on MetalForge via drummer profiles.

## Verify
1. 3 new entries in top10Lists.js with correct slugs
2. All 3 list pages load correctly at /top10/[slug]
3. 3 LLM files created
4. Pages appear in sitemap.xml
5. Each page has ≥10 ranked entries with internal links

## Done
- [ ] progressive-death-metal-drummers added
- [ ] symphonic-metal-drummers added
- [ ] blackened-death-metal-drummers added
- [ ] 3 LLM files created
title: SEO batch: Top-10 list batch 21 — progressive-death-metal-drummers + symphonic-metal-drummers + blackened-death-metal-drummers (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
